"[114] [Appended, 09:25:42] [20] 18-1 REQ CONTACT RP TO TC SCENE"

"[113] [Appended, 09:25:42] [19] ** A19526 TRAINING 20660** RP CALLED IN AND ADVISED HIS FRIEND PAUL GARVIN CALLED HIM USING A PASSING MOTERISTS PHONE AND ADVISED HE WANTED TO KNOW HOW TO TURN HIMSELF IN. HE ADVISED HE WAS AT AN UNKNOWN LOCATION NEAR THE TC SITE AND WAS POSSIBLY WALKING. HE STATED HIS FRIEND CAMPED IN THE FOREST OVERNIGHT. HE STATED HIS FRIEND MADE A MISTAKE AND HAD A PANIC ATTACK AND RAN. RP WAS HESITANT TO ANSWER QUESTIONS AND IT SOUND LIKE HE WAS WISPERING TO SOMEONE IN THE BACKGROUND. ABOVE 1020 IS CALLERS RRR"
"[86] 18-1 CONFIRMED LN 21 IS THE SUBJ THAT'S OUTSTANDING"
"[78] B18-023 18-R9 AND I ARE PARTNERED UP WILL BE HEDING TO RD 500 WITH CF"
"[76] B18-023 ENRT TO RD 500 WILL BE ON FOOT WILL NOT HAVE CELL SERVICE WILL TRY THE RADIO / MINE HAVING ISSUES"
